summary: Completed comprehensive testing of U-CAN pet services platform for Mercado Pago integration, WebSocket chat, and Google Maps search. All backend APIs working (21/21 tests passed). Frontend UI fully functional including plans page with 3 subscription tiers, search page with map markers, and provider profile with subscription-gated contact info.

issues: Google Maps shows 'For development purposes only' watermark and 'This page can't load Google Maps correctly' popup - this is due to Google Maps API billing configuration on the API key, not a code issue. Map functionality works correctly with markers displayed.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans returns exactly 3 plans with correct prices (9990, 24990, 79990 CLP)
Backend: All plans have plan_id, name, duration_months, price_clp, features fields
Backend: Plan 3 months correctly marked as 'popular'
Backend: POST /api/webhooks/mercadopago responds with status:ok
Backend: Webhook handles empty payload gracefully
Backend: Webhook handles non-payment notification types
Backend: POST /api/subscription/create-payment requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/subscription/my requires authentication (401)
Backend: All 21 pytest tests pass
Frontend: Plans page (/planes) loads with 3 plan cards showing prices ($10k, $25k, $80k CLP)
Frontend: Plans page shows Mercado Pago security badge with payment methods
Frontend: Subscribe buttons redirect to Emergent Auth for unauthenticated users
Frontend: Chat page (/chat) redirects to /login for unauthenticated users
Frontend: Search page (/search) shows Google Map with 5 provider markers
Frontend: Search page has search input, 'Mi ubicación' button, 'Buscar' button
Frontend: Provider list shows 5 providers with photos, names, ratings, services
Frontend: Clicking provider card navigates to /provider/{id}
Frontend: Provider profile shows business name, location, verified badge, rating, reviews
Frontend: Provider profile shows services section with prices
Frontend: Provider profile shows 'Suscríbete para contactar' for non-subscribers
Frontend: 'Ver Planes de Suscripción' button navigates to /planes page
critical_code_review_comments: Google Maps API key requires billing enabled in Google Cloud Console for production use - the 'For development purposes only' watermark will persist until billing is configured
seed_data_creation: None - existing seed data with 5 providers used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) GET /api/subscription/plans returns 3 plans with correct prices, 2) POST /api/webhooks/mercadopago responds ok, 3) Plans page shows 3 cards with Mercado Pago badge, 4) Chat redirects to login, 5) Search shows map with markers, 6) Provider click navigates to profile, 7) Profile shows subscribe CTA for non-subscribers. Google Maps watermark is expected (API billing limitation).
